text: There is a heavy silence here, amplified by the darkened hallways and the cold, clinical light. The emptiness feels both liberating and unnerving. Shadows linger in the corners, making me reflect on the nature of solitude and absence. It sparks a blend of curiosity and unease within me. Why is it that the lack of people and sound makes the world feel so unfamiliar? Am I seeking meaning in the quiet, or merely comfort in my own thoughts?
